name: Bobbatlu
steps: Cook the chana dal until just soft, drain fully and grind with jaggery and cardamom into a smooth purnam.
Knead maida with a pinch of salt, water and a spoon of ghee into a soft, elastic dough and rest for an hour.
Take a ball of dough, flatten it, and stuff a bigger ball of purnam inside and seal.
Roll it out gently into a thick circle on a greased sheet.
Roast on a tawa with ghee until golden spots appear on both sides. Serve warm.
